name: Sdi Limited
analysis: SDI has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.3332. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at A$1.3455 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry A$1.3332, stop A$1.2202, target A$1.3850. Risk/reward is 0.46:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
